    <!-- Faved tracking script -->
    <script nonce="">
      (function() {
        const STORAGE_KEY = 'faved_affiliate';
        const USER_ID_KEY = 'faved_user_id';
        const STORAGE_DURATION = 365 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000; // 1 year
        
        // Generate or retrieve unique user ID
        function getUserId() {
          let sessionId = localStorage.getItem(USER_ID_KEY);
          if (!sessionId) {
            sessionId = 'user_' + Date.now() + '_' + Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9);
            localStorage.setItem(USER_ID_KEY, sessionId);
          }
          return sessionId;
        }

        // Get URL parameters
        const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
        const utmCampaign = urlParams.get('utm_campaign');
        const utmContent = urlParams.get('utm_content');
        const fromFaved = urlParams.get('from_faved');

        // Store affiliate data if UTM deal is present and from_faved parameter is set
        if (utmCampaign && fromFaved) {
          const sessionId = getUserId();
          const affiliateData = {
            code: utmCampaign,
            faved: true,
            content: utmContent,
            sessionId: sessionId,
            timestamp: Date.now(),
          };
          localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(affiliateData));
        }

        // Check for existing affiliate data
        const stored = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);
        if (stored) {
          try {
            const data = JSON.parse(stored);
            // Check if data is still valid (within 1 year) and is a Faved deal
            if (Date.now() - data.timestamp < STORAGE_DURATION && (data.faved || data.content === 'faved')) {
              // Track page view
              fetch('https://faved.com/api/affiliate-links/track', {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                body: JSON.stringify({
                  slug: 'runway-ml',
                  code: data.code,
                  sessionId: data.sessionId,
                  referrer: document.referrer,
                  userAgent: navigator.userAgent,
                  timestamp: Date.now(),
                  url: window.location.pathname,
                })
              }).catch(err => console.error('Faved tracking error:', err));
            } else {
              // Expired, remove it
              localStorage.removeItem(STORAGE_KEY);
            }
          } catch (e) {
            console.error('Faved error parsing affiliate data:', e);
          }
        }
      })();
    </script>
